zh.lifeSummary: 當Tiphaine de RETZ於大約1185年出生在法國帕斯 德 拉 洛易洛易-阿特藍可馬庫爾時，她的父親Seigneur Garsire III de Retz22歲，母親Eustachie Des Chênes27歲。她和Roald III de DONGES至少有1個女兒。她去世於大約1205年在法國帕斯 德 拉 洛易洛易-阿特藍可東格斯享年22歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: RETZ
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from any of several places called Retz or Retzen in northwestern Germany and Austria.
from a short form of any of various ancient Germanic compound personal names formed with rād, rāt ‘advice, counsel’.

variants.name: Retzer
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Helmut, Helmuth, Reinhold.
habitational name for someone from Retz in Austria (see   Retz  ).

en.lifeSummary: When Tiphaine de RETZ was born about 1185, in Machecoul, Loire-Atlantique, Pays de la Loire, France, her father, Seigneur Garsire III de Retz, was 22 and her mother, Eustachie Des Chênes, was 27. She had at least 1 daughter with Roald III de DONGES. She died about 1205, in Donges, Loire-Atlantique, Pays de la Loire, France, at the age of 22.

ja.lifeSummary: Tiphaine de RETZが約1185年にフランスペイズ ド ラ ロイアーロイアーエ-アトランティクマチェコウルで生まれた時，父Seigneur Garsire III de Retzは22歳，母Eustachie Des Chênesは27歳であった。彼女はRoald III de DONGESとの間に少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は約1205年にフランスペイズ ド ラ ロイアーロイアーエ-アトランティクドンジェズで22歳で死去した。

ko.Machecoul,44087,Loire-Atlantique,Pays de: 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 로이레-앳랜티크 맥헤콜

ko.lifeSummary: Tiphaine de RETZ(이)가 대략 1185년 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 로이레-앳랜티크 맥헤콜에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Seigneur Garsire III de Retz(은)는 22세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Eustachie Des Chênes(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 Roald III de DONGES(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1205년 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 로이레-앳랜티크 도그스에서 22세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Tiphaine de RETZ родилась около 1185 г. в местности мачекоул, лоире-атлантику, пеис де ла лоир, Франция, её отцу по имени Seigneur Garsire III de Retz было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Eustachie Des Chênes, 27. У неё была по крайней мере 1 дочь от Roald III de DONGES. Она умерла около 1205 г. в местности донгесь, лоире-атлантику, пеис де ла лоир, Франция в возрасте 22 лет.
